recent_projects.summary: Implementation of example parser plugins for advent-of-code-data

recent_projects.name: contact
recent_projects.summary: This Python curses client for Meshtastic is a terminal-based client designed to manage device settings, enable mesh chat communication, and handle configuration backups and restores.
recent_projects.author: Ben Lipsey

recent_projects.name: auto-ukg
recent_projects.summary: Automated tool for interacting with UKG Dimensions
recent_projects.author: Chris

recent_projects.name: turboloader
recent_projects.summary: Production-ready ML data loading library with distributed training support, SIMD-accelerated transforms, pipe operator composition, HDF5/TFRecord/Zarr support, and GPU transforms. Built with C++20 for maximum performance.
recent_projects.author: TurboLoader Contributors

recent_projects.name: pyg-nightly
recent_projects.summary: Graph Neural Network Library for PyTorch

recent_projects.name: anp
recent_projects.summary: An SDK that enables agents to connect with each other, allowing them to perform identity authentication, end-to-end encrypted communication, automatic protocol negotiation based on LLMs, and efficient data exchange.

recent_projects.name: pykoppu
recent_projects.summary: SDK for KOPPU (K-dimensional Organoid Probabilistic Processing Unit)
recent_projects.author: KOPPU Team

recent_bad_license_projects.name: metaflowx
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: A comprehensive, modular machine-learning framework that consolidates datasets, model architectures, optimization algorithms, preprocessing utilities, and evaluation tools into a unified toolkit designed for research, experimentation, and education. metaflowx streamlines end-to-end workflows—from data ingestion to model selection, training, tuning, and validation—empowering learners and researchers with a clean, extensible, and production-aware interface.

recent_bad_license_projects.name: bzfs
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: bzfs is a reliable near real-time, parallel replication and backup command-line tool for ZFS. It replicates snapshots from many local or remote source ZFS datasets (and their descendants) to local or remote destination datasets, using zfs send/receive and ssh, and can operate at sub-second intervals across large fleets of hosts.
